name: MASIMO CORP
summary: PART I Overview We are a global medical technology company that develops and produces a wide array of industry-leading monitoring technologies, including innovative measurements, sensors, and patient monitors. Powered by the Masimo Hospital Automation and Masimo SafetyNet platforms, Masimo connectivity, automation, and telehealth and telemonitoring solutions are improving and automating care delivery in the hospital.
